Skip navigation links
  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Animal
    Represents the different animal species in the Cascadia game.
    BearScore
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the Bear species in the Cascadia game.
    BearScoreCardA
    Represents the scoring rule for Bear groups based on the number of pairs of bears.
    BearScoreCardB
    Represents the scoring rule for Bear groups specifically targeting groups of size 3.
    BearScoreCardC
    Represents the scoring rule for Bears that awards points based on group sizes and provides a bonus for having groups of all specified sizes.
    BearScoreCardD
    Represents the scoring rule for Bears that awards points based on group sizes.
    BuzzardScore
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the Buzzard species in the Cascadia game.
    BuzzardScoreCardA
    Represents the scoring rule for Bear groups based on the number of pairs of bears.
    BuzzardScoreCardB
    Represents the scoring rule for Buzzards based on isolated buzzards with at least one other in line of sight.
    BuzzardScoreCardC
    Represents the scoring rule for Buzzards based on lines of sight.
    BuzzardScoreCardD
    Represents the scoring rule for Buzzards based on pairs in straight lines.
    ElkScore
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the Elk species in the Cascadia game.
    ElkScoreCardA
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardA.
    ElkScoreCardB
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardB.
    ElkScoreCardC
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardC.
    ElkScoreCardD
    Represents the scoring rule for Elk based on the ElkScoreCardD.
    Environnement
    Represents the game environment for Cascadia.
    FamilyScoreCard
    Represents a scoring card for the family rule in the Cascadia game.
    FauneBag
    Represents a bag containing a collection of animals in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScore
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the fox animal in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardA
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "A" card in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardB
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "B" card in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardC
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "C" card in the Cascadia game.
    FoxScoreCardD
    Implements the scoring rule for Foxes according to the "D" card in the Cascadia game.
    GameChoices
    Provides utility methods for gathering player input and game settings.
    GameLot
    Represents the collection of available tile-animal pairs (lots) in the Cascadia game.
    GameManager
    Manages the Cascadia game, including initialization, turns, and score calculation.
    GameViewHex
    Manages the graphical rendering and user interactions for the Cascadia game with hexagonal tiles.
    GameViewSquare
    Provides methods to render and interact with the graphical interface of the game Cascadia.
    Habitat
    Represents the different habitat types in the Cascadia game.
    HabitatScore
    Represents the scoring mechanism for habitat groups in the Cascadia game.
    ImageLoader
    Utility class to load and cache images for the Cascadia game.
    IntermediateScoreCard
    Represents the scoring mechanism for the "Intermediate" scoring card in the Cascadia game.
    Lot
    Represents a general lot in the Cascadia game, which can either be a Tile or a TileAnimalPair.
    Main
     
    MajorityBonus
    Represents the calculation and assignment of majority bonuses in Cascadia.
    Player
    Represents a player in the Cascadia game, responsible for placing tiles and animals on their board and calculating scores.
    PlayerProgress
     
    SalmonScore
    Represents the scoring mechanism for salmon in the Cascadia game.
    SalmonScoreCardA
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon groups with incremental scoring based on group size.
    SalmonScoreCardB
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon groups with a maximum size limit.
    SalmonScoreCardC
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon groups based on their size.
    SalmonScoreCardD
    Represents the scoring rule for Salmon based on their groups and adjacent animals.
    ScoreCalculator
    Manages score calculations for a specific player using Java Streams.
    ScoreRule
    Represents the scoring rule for an animal card in the Cascadia game.
    ScoringRule
    Represents a scoring rule for the Cascadia game.
    SuccessManager
    Manages success achievements by loading and retrieving them from a resource file.
    Tile
    Represents a tile in the Cascadia game that contains specific habitats, associated animals, and supports rotation for gameplay mechanics.
    TileAnimalPair
    Represents a pairing of a Tile and an Animal.
    Tiles
    Manages the tiles in the Cascadia game.

    Generated by Ant
